input:
IT IS OBLIGATORY
FOR an authority to which this section applies
TO have due regard to the desirability of exercising its functions in a way that is designed to reduce the inequalities of outcome which result from socio-economic disadvantage
WHEN/IF/WHERE making decisions of a strategic nature about how to exercise its functions.

IT IS OBLIGATORY
FOR an authority to which this section applies
TO take into account any guidance issued in accordance with subsection (2A)
WHEN/IF/WHERE deciding how to fulfil a duty to which it is subject under subsection (1).

IT IS PROHIBITED
FOR Provision made under subsection (1)
TO impose a duty on an authority in relation to any devolved Scottish functions or devolved Welsh functions.

input:
IT IS PERMITTED
FOR regulations under this section
TO make any amendments of section 1 that appear to the Minister or Ministers to be necessary or expedient in consequence of provision made under subsection (1) or (as the case may be) subsection (4).
